Subject: Group Photo Tomorrow, 11/15, at 1 pm
Message:
Rain or shine, we will be having our picture taken for this year's West Power Trading customer mailing tomorrow.  Please join us at the Salmon Street fountain steps at 1 pm.  If it is raining, our photo will be taken on the bridge level, in the southeast corner by the number Two World Trade Center building.

Let me know if you have any questions!
